Hero.subtitle: Transform your customer service with sophisticated artificial intelligence that understands Darija and automates your sales 24/7.

HowItWorks.title: Set Up in 3 Steps
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Simply scan the QR code with your WhatsApp Business app to sync with Déléguè.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Define your AI's personality, products, and language preferences (Darija, Arabic, French).
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Let the agent answer questions, take orders, and qualify your leads automatically.

Features.description: Specifically designed to meet the unique needs of growing Moroccan businesses.
Features.feature1Desc: Our AI speaks fluent Darija and understands the culture, ensuring natural communication with your local customers.
Features.feature2Desc: Never lose a client due to time zones again. The AI responds instantly, at any hour of the day or night.
Features.feature3Desc: Track your AI agent's performance through a comprehensive dashboard: conversion rates, message volume, and customer satisfaction.

Pricing.title: Transparent Pricing
Pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your business size.
Pricing.contactMessage: Hi, I'd like to subscribe to the {plan} plan on Déléguè.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Déléguè.
FAQ.q1: How does Déléguè work with WhatsApp?
FAQ.a1: Déléguè connects to your WhatsApp Business through a simple QR code scan. Once connected, our AI automatically responds to your customer messages using the personality and knowledge you've configured.
FAQ.q2: Does the AI understand Moroccan Darija?
FAQ.a2: Yes! Our AI is specially trained to understand and respond in Darija, Standard Arabic, and French. It automatically adapts to the language your customer uses.
FAQ.a3: Absolutely. All conversations are encrypted and stored securely. We never share your data with third parties and comply with GDPR standards.
FAQ.q4: Can I customize the agent's responses?
FAQ.a4: Yes, you can define the agent's personality, tone, greeting and fallback messages, and feed its knowledge base with your own documents (PDF, DOCX, TXT).
FAQ.a5: We accept bank transfers, CashPlus, and cash payments. Contact us on WhatsApp to activate your subscription. CMI card payment integration is coming soon.
FAQ.a6: Contact us on WhatsApp to discuss a personalized demo and available trial options for your business.

Footer.description: The AI platform revolutionizing WhatsApp customer service in Morocco.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.intro: Welcome to Déléguè. By using our service, you accept these terms of use.
Terms.section1Content: By accessing our platform and using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms of use. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use our service.
Terms.section2Content: Déléguè provides an artificial intelligence platform that enables businesses to automatically manage their WhatsApp conversations. The service includes AI agent configuration, knowledge base management, and conversation tracking.
Terms.section3Content: You agree to use the service in compliance with applicable laws and WhatsApp's terms of service. Any misuse, including spam or harassment through our platform, is strictly prohibited.
Terms.section4Content: Subscriptions are billed monthly at the rates shown on our pricing page. Payments are made by bank transfer, CashPlus, or cash. Service activation is done after payment confirmation.
Terms.section5Content: Déléguè is not responsible for losses resulting from the use of our service, including WhatsApp account restrictions or suspensions due to the use of the unofficial API.
Terms.section6Content: For any questions about these terms, contact us via WhatsApp or email.

whatsapp.step3: Tap 'Link a Device' and scan the QR code displayed here.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: At Déléguè, we take the protection of your personal data very seriously.
Privacy.section1Content: We collect information you provide during registration (name, email, phone number, company name) as well as conversation data processed by our AI.
Privacy.section2Content: Your data is used exclusively to provide and improve our service. Conversations are processed by our AI to generate relevant responses and are stored securely.
Privacy.section3Content: All data is stored on secure servers with encryption. We use Supabase as our database infrastructure, ensuring a high level of security.
Privacy.section4Content: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties. Conversation data is processed through Google Gemini AI for response generation.
Privacy.section5Content: In compliance with GDPR and Moroccan law 09-08, you have the right to access, modify, and delete your personal data at any time.
Privacy.section6Content: For any questions about data protection, contact us via WhatsApp or email.
